official_functions.role: Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state
Construct, write, and decode the award_stats packet body
Define the per-entry stats map key/value body shape
Write and dispatch-decode the full official Play clientbound award_stats frame

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns award_stats immediately after animate.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the award_stats id to ClientboundAwardStatsPacket.
The official award_stats body is an Object2IntMap<Stat<?>> encoded as VarInt count, then per entry Stat.STREAM_CODEC key followed by VarInt value.
The fixture uses an empty Object2IntOpenHashMap<Stat<?>>, so the generated body is only the count 0 and does not require initialized Minecraft/game state or stat registry entries.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded stat count, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove non-empty Stat registry entry decoding, stat semantics, UI/stat screen behavior, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer non-empty Stat registry entry decoding, stat semantics, UI/stat screen behavior, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
